# Statsministerens kontor

*1 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Instruks for Regjeringen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) | Regjeringsinstruksen | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1909-03-23) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1909-03-23.md) |
